reasoning: The Manifold market was priced at 15% on October 30, 2025, when Bitcoin was trading around $110,000. Since then, BTC has experienced a sharp sell-off, dropping below the $100,000 psychological support level by November 9 amid broader macro de-risking and 'AI trade concerns'. To reach the $150,000 mark by the end of 2025, Bitcoin would now need to rally more than 50% in just 52 days. Based on historical volatility (~60%) and standard barrier option heuristics, the probability of touching a level 50% above the current spot in 1.5 months is around 6-8%, especially without an explicit catalyst and while facing strong downward momentum. Therefore, updating aggressively down from the October 15% baseline is warranted.
